title: Voxel1's Immersive items
description: make items much more immersive such as changing the texture based on how many items their are in a stack and more to come.
body:
**you can use distibute these assets as long as you give credit to me. do not claim it as your own work unless you modify it in a significant way.**

Uses the new item model changes in 1.21.4 to change item models in ways only dreamed of before. 

All the assets are made by me and I will try keep add new stuff to pack. Anyways pls enjoy
